title: Pixel a Go-Go – GameBoy Camera and retro screenshot upscaling for iOS
abstract:
Smile, you can now share Game Boy Camera photos (or any retro game screenshot) in 5k resolution to your Instagram account, via SMS/iMessage, or anywhere on the web you share photos.

Pixel a Go-Go! has a variety of ways to import photos from a real Game Boy, FPGA handhelds like the Analogue Po
